overall_justification: While the edition mentions the "Caixa de Conversão" in the context of Argentina, it primarily reports on events and doesn't offer explicit arguments for or against the concept in Brazil.  The mention is within a larger report on Argentine financial news, including stock market difficulties and withdrawals from the Caixa de Conversão.  There is no direct connection made to the Brazilian monetary debate.

supporting_evidence.quote: Da Caixa de Conversão foram retirados ha poucos dias mais cinco milhões de pesos.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: This quote is a factual report on the Argentine Caixa de Conversão, indicating its presence in the news but not advocating a particular stance in the Brazilian context.

supporting_evidence.quote: A respeito do kraek na bolsa argentina, diz-se que a liquidação definitiva das operações em fins de novembro attingirá a mais de 92 milhões de pesos, fora umas novas quebras que se manifestaram nestes últimos dias.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: This provides context for the mention of the Argentine Caixa, showing it's part of a broader financial report, not a focused discussion on Brazilian monetary policy.
